name: dual-html-preview (PRD-6955 shape: 2nd embed declares const DATA)
source:
# Chart page ```html h=400px preview
``` Some prose between the two embeds. ```html h=640px preview
```
notes: The PRD-6955 trigger shape (reduced): two `html preview` embeds, the second declaring `const DATA={...}` (the brace-injection target, const DATA= -> {onst). O6 extracts every <script> and asserts JS-parse validity + that the const head was never single-character-substituted.

name: single-html-preview with const declaration
notes: A single html preview embed with const declarations in its script — single-client round-trip + JS-parse baseline.
